There is little uncertainty language such as “maybe” or “probably.” That suggests the model itself was highly confident. I estimate its reported/implicit confidence to be in the low-to-mid 90s.

While the samples are randomly selected and assumed independent, the issue arises with the number of failures in the female group, which is 4 (66 successes).
